name: Battacor
description: A weapon that builds charge the more it kills. Hit capacity then release for an obliterating discharge of power.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A weapon that builds charge the more it kills. Hit capacity then release for an obliterating discharge of power.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Heart Noctrul
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Tepa Nodule
components.description:
The iridescent nodules on these plants glow brightly in cold environments.

Location: Orb Vallis on Venus

components.name: Tromyzon Entroplasma
components.description:
A solvent that reconstitutes waste product from the Weeping Towers into degenerated matter.

Source: Dismantled from Tromyzon servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Tromyzon in Orb Vallis Pond Hotspots during Cold weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Battacor’s alt-fire, Mausolon, and Trumna causing self damage instead of self stagger.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed kills with the Battacor's Alt Fire contributing towards its charges.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Battacor having unlimited usage of Alt Fire.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Battacor’s Charge state FX not always triggering for Clients.
Fixed having 0% Accuracy when using the Battacor exclusively.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Battacor charge UI persisting on the screen in times where it should be hidden (hacking, etc).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Battacor looping its fire animation/sound for Clients as reported here:

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Fieldron crafting requirements for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor from 20 to 10.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: *Research for the Kreska, Ocucor, and Battacor can be found in the Dojo Energy Lab, or in the Market for Platinum.
